details: web_search requires BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable or Gateway configuration. Run: openclaw configure --section web
action_required: Configure Brave Search API key in Gateway

details: Cannot post to Vchat #trading - Rocket.Chat API authentication tokens not stored in secrets. Created sentinel user in MongoDB but auth token generation requires additional setup.
action_required: Store RC auth token or admin credentials in .secrets/, or configure Sentinel user with proper RC token
